attributes.action: Ban the import or sale of electric motorbikes that are not type-approved.
attributes.additional_details: These vehicles are often unregistered, uninsured, and ridden by young people at high speeds, creating a serious risk of accidents and injuries.
attributes.background: Ban the import or sale of electric motorbikes that are not type-approved for road use, as this could significantly reduce their availability and the associated risks. People have already died as a result of these vehicles availibility

rejection.details:
The following petitions call for similar actions: 

Ban all e-bikes & electric scooters in public
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758784

Introduce mandatory registration and licensing for e-bikes
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/742978
